info.name: SetuGeo Premium API - Full Suite
info.description: The definitive Postman collection for SetuGeo. Includes recursive geographic drills, advanced banking analytics, geospatial clustering, and financial conversion tools. Designed for immediate production-ready testing.

request.description: Webhook endpoint for Razorpay event delivery. This endpoint does not use bearer authentication.
